steps.title: Check both inequalities
steps.content:
Every row must satisfy both conditions:
$$
y<x
$$
$$
x<22
$$

steps.title: Eliminate large x-values
steps.content: Any table containing $x$-values $23$, $24$, and $25$ fails $x<22$ immediately.

steps.title: Compare the remaining tables
steps.content: For the table with $x=19,20,21$ and $y=18,19,20$, each row has $y=x-1$, so $yA.
